localizedDescriptions.en: Document to communicate information to others, commonly in response to a request from another party.
Identification information about the report.
The status of the entire report. Note: This is not the status of any of the report components.

A structured clinician-reported assessment for orthopaedic knee follow-up, including knee arthroplasty context, pain, range of motion, stability, flexion contracture, extension lag, clinical alignment, functional ability and the patient's physical condition in relation to age.
Contextual information about the knee arthroplasty or knee prosthesis relevant to this clinical follow-up assessment.
Type or product family of the knee prosthesis relevant to this follow-up assessment.
Free-text description of the prosthesis type when the coded value "Other" is selected.

children.name: Side operated or to be operated
children.localizedName: Side operated or to be operated

localizedNames.en: Side operated or to be operated

localizedDescriptions.en: Laterality of the knee that has been operated on or is planned for operation.
Clinician-reported assessment of pain, mobility, stability, flexion contracture, extension lag and clinical alignment of the operated or assessed knee.
Clinician-reported assessment of knee pain experienced while walking.
Clinician-reported assessment of knee pain experienced when using stairs.
Clinician-reported assessment of knee pain experienced at rest.
Range of motion of the knee documented using the neutral-zero method.
Maximum flexion angle of the assessed knee, expressed in degrees.
Neutral-zero reference position of the assessed knee, usually documented as 0 degrees.
Maximum extension angle or extension deficit of the assessed knee, expressed in degrees.
Clinician-assessed medial-lateral stability of the knee during valgus and varus stress testing.
Clinician-assessed anterior-posterior stability of the knee, expressed as a categorical range in millimetres.
Clinician-assessed passive flexion contracture of the knee, expressed as a categorical angular range.
Clinician-assessed difference between passive and active knee extension, expressed as a categorical angular range.
Clinician-reported coronal plane alignment of the assessed knee, documented as valgus or varus angle.
Clinical valgus alignment angle of the assessed knee, expressed in degrees.
Clinical varus alignment angle of the assessed knee, expressed in degrees.
Calculated total knee score derived from the knee score items according to the configured scoring algorithm.

annotations.comment: The scoring algorithm is not defined by this archetype. Implementations must define the calculation logic, score range and interpretation in the template, application logic or implementation guide.

localizedDescriptions.en: Clinician-reported assessment of functional ability related to walking, stair use, assistive device use and activity level.
Clinician-reported assessment of the patient's walking capacity, based on distance or duration.

list.label: 500 to 1000 m or more than 30 minutes

localizedLabels.en: 500 to 1000 m or more than 30 minutes

list.label: Less than 500 m or 15 minutes or less

localizedLabels.en: Less than 500 m or 15 minutes or less

localizedDescriptions.en: Clinician-reported assessment of the patient's ability to ascend and descend stairs.
Assistive walking devices used by the patient for mobility.
Clinician-reported assessment of the patient's general activity and independence level.
Calculated total function score derived from the function score items according to the configured scoring algorithm.

annotations.comment: The scoring algorithm is not defined by this archetype. Implementations must define the calculation logic, score range and interpretation in the template, application logic or implementation guide.

localizedDescriptions.en: Clinician-reported assessment of the patient's overall physical condition in relation to age.
Overall physical condition assessed in relation to the patient's age.
Name of the clinician responsible for, or performing, the clinical follow-up assessment.
Timing of the follow-up assessment in relation to surgery, baseline assessment or the planned follow-up schedule.
Number of years after surgery or baseline assessment for follow-up timing, used when "Other number of years" is selected.
Structured assessment of orthopaedic clinical follow-up information, including known conditions, complications and associated orthopaedic conditions.
Other known pathologies, comorbidities or body system-related conditions recorded at clinical follow-up.

annotations.comment:
If status is Present, at least one Other known condition should be recorded.

If status is None known, no Other known condition should be recorded.

If Other is selected, Other known condition description should be recorded.

localizedDescriptions.en: Status indicating whether other known conditions are recorded at this follow-up.

annotations.comment: Use when the presence of other known conditions is unknown or was not assessed.

localizedDescriptions.en: No other known conditions are recorded at this follow-up.
One or more other known conditions are recorded.
It is unknown or was not assessed whether other conditions are present.
Category or specific type of other known condition recorded at clinical follow-up.

annotations.comment: Repeatable element for multiselect use. Record each selected option as a separate instance. Do not record a value when the status is None known.

localizedDescriptions.en: Known condition related to the nervous system.
Known condition related to the gastrointestinal system.
Known osteoporosis.
Known condition related to the respiratory tract.
Known condition related to the urogenital system.
Known condition related to the endocrine system.
Known condition related to the cardiovascular system.
Known diabetes mellitus.
Other known condition not represented by the listed options.
Free-text description of another known condition not represented by the coded options.

annotations.comment: Use when Other is selected, or to provide additional clarification about a selected condition.

localizedDescriptions.en: Systemic complications occurring since implantation of this prosthesis.

annotations.comment:
If status is Present, at least one systemic complication should be recorded.

If status is None known, no systemic complication should be recorded.

Record each selected complication as a separate Systemic complication instance.

If Other is selected, Other systemic complication description should be recorded.

Record the complication date when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Status indicating whether systemic complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.

annotations.comment: Use Present when one or more systemic complications are recorded. Use None known only when no systemic complications are recorded. Use Unknown or not assessed when this information is unavailable or was not assessed.

localizedDescriptions.en: No systemic complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.
One or more systemic complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.
It is unknown or was not assessed whether systemic complications occurred.
Single systemic complication recorded since implantation of this prosthesis.

annotations.comment: Repeatable cluster for multiselect use. Record each selected complication as a separate instance, with its date when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Category or specific type of systemic complication recorded since prosthesis implantation.

annotations.comment: Use one coded value for each systemic complication instance. Use Other when the complication is not represented by the listed options.

localizedDescriptions.en: Pulmonary embolism occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Thrombophlebitis occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Systemic complication related to the central nervous system.
Systemic complication related to the respiratory tract.
Systemic complication related to the cardiovascular system.
Systemic complication related to the urinary or urological system.
Systemic complication related to the gastrointestinal system.
Other systemic complication not represented by the listed options.
Date when the systemic complication occurred or was identified.

annotations.comment: Record the date next to the systemic complication when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Free-text description of a systemic complication not represented by the coded options.

annotations.comment: Use when Other is selected, or to provide additional clarification about a selected systemic complication.

localizedDescriptions.en: Local complications occurring since implantation of this prosthesis.

annotations.comment:
If status is Present, at least one local complication should be recorded.

If status is None known, no local complication should be recorded.

Record each selected complication as a separate Local complication instance.

If Other is selected, Other local complication description should be recorded.

Record the complication date or year when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Status indicating whether local complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.

annotations.comment: Use Present when one or more local complications are recorded. Use None known only when no local complications are recorded. Use Unknown or not assessed when this information is unavailable or was not assessed.

localizedDescriptions.en: No local complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.
One or more local complications are recorded since prosthesis implantation.
It is unknown or was not assessed whether local complications occurred.
Single local complication recorded since implantation of this prosthesis.

annotations.comment: Repeatable cluster for multiselect use. Record each selected complication as a separate instance, with its date or year when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Category or specific type of local complication recorded since prosthesis implantation.

annotations.comment: Use one coded value for each local complication instance. Use Other when the complication is not represented by the listed options.

localizedDescriptions.en: Local dislocation occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Local haematoma or seroma occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Persistent wound drainage occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Wound dehiscence occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Local neuropraxia occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Prosthesis loosening occurring since implantation.
Deep sepsis or deep infection occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Superficial sepsis or superficial infection occurring since prosthesis implantation.
Other local complication not represented by the listed options.
Date or year when the local complication occurred or was identified.

annotations.comment: Record the date or year next to the complication when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Free-text description of a local complication not represented by the coded options.

annotations.comment: Use when Other is selected, or to provide additional clarification about a selected local complication.

localizedDescriptions.en: Other associated orthopaedic pathologies or conditions relevant to this clinical follow-up.

annotations.comment:
If status is Present, at least one associated orthopaedic condition should be recorded.

If status is None known, no associated orthopaedic condition should be recorded.

Record each selected condition as a separate Other associated orthopaedic condition instance.

Record laterality, date or year, and description when applicable.

localizedDescriptions.en: Status indicating whether other associated orthopaedic conditions are recorded at this follow-up.

annotations.comment: Use Present when one or more associated orthopaedic conditions are recorded. Use None known only when no associated orthopaedic conditions are recorded. Use Unknown or not assessed when this information is unavailable or was not assessed.

localizedDescriptions.en: No other associated orthopaedic conditions are recorded at this follow-up.
One or more other associated orthopaedic conditions are recorded at this follow-up.
It is unknown or was not assessed whether other associated orthopaedic conditions are present.
Single other associated orthopaedic condition recorded at this follow-up.

annotations.comment: Repeatable cluster for multiselect use. Record each selected condition as a separate instance, with laterality, date or year, and description when applicable.

localizedDescriptions.en: Category or specific type of other associated orthopaedic condition recorded at clinical follow-up.

annotations.comment: Use one coded value for each associated orthopaedic condition instance. Use Other when the condition is not represented by the listed options.

localizedDescriptions.en: Associated condition affecting the contralateral knee.
Associated condition affecting the ankle or foot.
Associated condition affecting the wrist or hand.
Associated condition affecting the opposite hip.
Associated condition affecting the shoulder.
Associated orthopaedic condition related to trauma.
Associated condition affecting the spine.
Associated condition affecting the elbow.
Other associated orthopaedic condition not represented by the listed options.
Date or year when the associated orthopaedic condition occurred or was identified.

annotations.comment: Record the date or year next to the associated orthopaedic condition when available.

localizedDescriptions.en: Laterality of the associated orthopaedic condition, where applicable.

annotations.comment: Record for contralateral knee or opposite hip when applicable, using the anatomical side affected.

localizedDescriptions.en: Left side.
Right side.
Both left and right sides.
Laterality is unknown.
Free-text description of the associated orthopaedic condition.

annotations.comment: Use when Trauma or Other is selected, or to provide additional clarification about a selected associated orthopaedic condition.

localizedDescriptions.en: Additional free-text comment about the orthopaedic clinical follow-up.

Radiographic follow-up assessment after knee arthroplasty, including implant alignment, component-specific radiolucent line measurements, patellar component zones, and patellar tracking and morphology measurements.
@ internal @
Date on which the X-ray examination was performed, if recorded separately from the observation event time.
Presence or absence of prior implants relevant to the knee arthroplasty radiographic follow-up.
Additional details about prior implants, such as type, anatomical location, laterality, date or removal status.
Left knee.
Right knee.
Hip-knee-ankle angle measured on a weight-bearing full-length lower limb radiograph.
AP implant alignment measurements.

annotations.comment: Image-Reference [img].

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Anteroposterior, ggf. Long-leg anteroposterior

localizedDescriptions.en: Femoral component alignment angle alpha as defined in the source radiographic scoring form.
Tibial component alignment angle beta as defined in the source radiographic scoring form.
Overall valgus alignment angle derived from the femoral and tibial component alignment measurements.
Lateral implant alignment measurements.

annotations.comment: Image-Reference [img].

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Lateral
Image-Reference [img].

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Lateral oder Anteroposterior

localizedDescriptions.en: Zone 1 radiolucent line width.
Zone 2 radiolucent line width.
Zone 3 radiolucent line width
Zone 4 radiolucent line width.
Zone 5 radiolucent line width.
Zone 6 radiolucent line width.
Zone 7 radiolucent line width.
Cumulative width of radiolucent lines across the assessed zones, expressed in millimetres.

annotations.comment: Image-Reference [img].

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Anteroposterior

localizedDescriptions.en: Zone 1 radiolucent line width.
Zone 2 radiolucent line width.
Zone 3 radiolucent line width
Zone 4 radiolucent line width.
Zone 5 radiolucent line width.
Zone 6 radiolucent line width.
Zone 7 radiolucent line width.
Cumulative width of radiolucent lines across the assessed zones, expressed in millimetres.

annotations.comment: Image-Reference [img].

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Lateral

localizedDescriptions.en: Zone 1 radiolucent line width.
Zone 2 radiolucent line width.
Zone 3 radiolucent line width
Cumulative width of radiolucent lines across the assessed zones, expressed in millimetres.

localizedDescriptions.en: Radiographic projection or view used for the assessment or measurement.

annotations.comment: Template: Skyline / Sunrise / Merchant

localizedDescriptions.en: Zone 1-5
Zone 1-3
Zone 1 radiolucent line width.
Zone 2 radiolucent line width.
Zone 3 radiolucent line width
Zone 4 radiolucent line width.
Zone 5 radiolucent line width.
Cumulative width of radiolucent lines across the assessed zones, expressed in millimetres.

annotations.comment: Template: Skyline / Sunrise / Merchant

localizedDescriptions.en: Width of the patella measured on the corresponding axial/tangential radiographic view.
Patellar tilt angle alpha as defined in the source radiographic scoring form.
Patellar tilt angle beta as defined in the source radiographic scoring form.
Angle between the patellar prosthetic component and the underlying patellar bone as defined in the source form.
